content.body:
Justifies every tracked top-level item and documents gitignore rules so
future contributors (and future refactors) have an explicit contract
about what belongs in the public repo.

Flags stale KB docs tied to retired orchestration/profile concepts for
owner review — does not delete (owner-scoped content).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: docs: add repo surface manifest (issue #67)
